title: Dutch Pepper Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy pepper stir fry made with onions, served in a Dutch oven. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in the Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced peppery and cook until tender-crisp, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the stir-fry noodles and cook according to package instructions, about 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Note: If using a non-stick Dutch oven, reduce heat to prevent burning.
If using a cast-iron Dutch oven, increase heat to achieve a nice sear.
